expectations.text: Recommends keeping yauth's OpenAPI spec separate from the app's spec
expectations.evidence: Lines 87-91: 'Do not merge yauth's openapi.json into your app's spec. They are separate concerns.'

expectations.text: Shows how to use @yackey-labs/yauth-client alongside the app's orval-generated client
expectations.evidence: Lines 109-122: createYAuthClient alongside app's generated client

expectations.text: Explains that credentials: include on fetch requests automatically carries the session cookie
expectations.evidence: Lines 131-149: Custom mutator with credentials: 'include' and detailed explanation

expectations.text: Does NOT suggest merging yauth routes into the app's openapi.json
expectations.evidence: Explicitly says 'Do not merge' and 'Your existing utoipa + orval pipeline stays exactly as-is. No changes needed.'

expectations.text: Mentions that both clients coexist since yauth routes are under /api/auth
expectations.evidence: Line 265: 'The two clients coexist naturally. They share the same session cookie because they hit the same origin.'
